title: Barebones x Short Swords
description: Short swords so PVP is a little better
body:
![Pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9923d1e75be5e910a79f8cc76bcc1b7175bdaee.png)
This pack adds short swords in the Barebones style!

## Important
[![Barebones pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4604eb496526668e001c95efce4676b7fccba3.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)

Equip this resource pack **ABOVE** BareBones for it to work proplerly.
![The pack above Barebones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abfcc365ca1c114616971b837572d029d4c921cd.png)

The original textures (which were modified) are from the [Barebones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack by robotpants.

## Check out some of my other stuff:

[![Pack download text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/628baf854e4c6688543d8c4bfa52a2a51c44203d.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clearer-menu-buttons)
